calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Off Calendar

Defendants In & Out Drain Cleaning, Inc. Dba In & Out Plumbing And Atef Mohammed Abbas'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ATEF ABBAS AND IN & OUT DRAIN CLEANING, INC.'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is granted without leave to amend as to the attorney's fees allegations and denied as to the punitive damages allegations. Plaintiff has not alleged any basis for her to obtain attorney's fees. Plaintiff has adequately alleged a request for punitive damages based on her allegation that Mr. Abbas made fraudulent representations to her. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED UNDER LEAD CASE NO. CGC-15-544912. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ATEF ABBAS AND IN & OUT DRAIN CLEANING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar as to the second cause of action for breach of contract, sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to the third cause of action for breach of express and implied warranties, and overruled as to the fourth cause of action for intentional misrepresentation. Plaintiff has dismissed her second cause of action. Her third cause of action does not adequately allege what express warranties were breached or that the primary objective of defendants' work at plaintiff's property was to provide pipe and other materials rather than to install the pipe, thereby creating a legal basis for the alleged implied warranties. If plaintiff can make such allegations in good faith, she is given leave to do so. The fourth cause of action adequately pleads a claim for promissory fraud. (CACI 1902). ORDER SIGNED AND FILED UNDER LEAD CASE NO. CGC-15-544912. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
